narrative: Trump pauses Project Freedom as Iran peace hopes lift sentiment — gold surges +2.22% near $4,670 while USD/JPY retreats to 156.37 on intervention caution and carry unwinds. AUD/USD firms to 0.7251 as NAB forecasts a June RBA hike to 4.60%, widening the AUD-Fed carry advantage to -60bp; equities +0.81%; DXY -0.36%; VIX 17.4. Watch RBNZ policy signals following mixed NZ labor data.
